snapshot.title: StudentOS — Study 3× Faster with AI

The system is just broken.Notes are messyScattered across apps, folders, and notebooks you never reopen.You don't know what to focus onEverything feels important, so nothing actually gets learned.Revising takes foreverRe-reading the same pages doesn't make anything stick.StudentOS organizes everything for you.From notes to quizzes to study plans — all in one place.Notes HubKeep every note in one clean, searchable workspace.📘 Biology🧪 Chemistry📐 Math📜 HistoryAI Study PackTurn any note into summaries, flashcards, and quizzes — instantly.FlashcardWhat is photosynthesis?Quick quizA. LightB. WaterC. BothSummaryAI TutorAsk anything.
